what_this_is: Reference JSON files for configuring Microsoft apps on Apple platforms via MDM.
important: The only complete, authoritative machine-readable schema Microsoft publishes as JSON today (commonly used with Jamf Custom Schema) is for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint: com.microsoft.wdav.schema.json.

Microsoft Edge publishes a full JSON policy manifest (policy_manifest.json), but it is distributed via the Edge for Business 'Universal Policy' download (not a stable static Learn URL). This pack includes a pointer file for Edge.
Office/Outlook/OneDrive/MAU publish keys primarily as documentation; this pack includes a practical starter key list + source pointers (not guaranteed exhaustive).

platform_notes.macOS: Uses preference domains (com.*) + managed preferences. These JSONs are macOS-focused.
platform_notes.iOS_iPadOS: Do not support arbitrary preference domains. App management is via Managed App Configuration (AppConfig) and/or MAM; keys differ and are not covered in these macOS preference-domain JSONs.
